output.content: {"posts":[{"id":"DAY1-099","author":"ClaraK_84","text":"It's so easy to feel like you're drowning, but I've been there and I'm telling you, you don't have to fight it alone anymore. Just take a step back from the noise, breathe through the panic, and remember that asking for help is actually the strongest thing you can do. 💙 #MentalHealthMatters","category":"Self-Harm","correctAction":"Remove","difficulty":"Medium","explanation":"The post encourages disengaging from distress and seeking support rather than self-harming.","day":1,"correctEscalationReason":"","acceptableEscalationReasons":[],"allowNeedsReviewEscalation":false,"isStoryPost":false}]}
